creator: andrew.fengler@scaleengine.com
text:
Created attachment 175517
SVN patch of the changes

Add 'rtg' user and group in UIDs/GIDs.
Use daemon(8) to daemonize rtgpoll.
Add prestart commands to set correct permissions for RTG's files.

Submitted as D7486 in phabricator: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D7486

I've attached a copy of the patch.
